summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 1 AI Cover Letter Generator. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - page loads correctly, all UI elements present, cover letter generation works, PDF download works, save/copy/edit functionality works.
ui_tests_passed: Cover Letter Generator page loads correctly
All UI elements present (selection-panel, resume-select, application-select, generate-btn, history-panel, editor-panel, cover-letter-editor, save-btn, copy-btn, download-pdf-btn, custom-notes-input)
Generate button triggers AI cover letter generation
Cover letter content appears in editor (1608 characters generated)
PDF download works (Cover_Letter_Test Company Inc_Senior Developer.pdf)
History panel shows saved cover letters
critical_code_review_comments: Cover letter generation uses Emergent LLM key correctly - NOT MOCKED
Proper error handling for missing resume/application (404)
Proper validation for empty update data (400)
Cover letters stored in cover_letters_v2 collection as documented

test_credentials.note: Multiple test users created during testing with pattern test_coverletter_*@example.com and uitest_*@example.com

seed_data_creation: Test resumes, applications, and cover letters created during testing (cleaned up after each test class)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 AI Cover Letter Generator is fully functional. All backend APIs work correctly: POST /api/cover-letter/generate, GET /api/cover-letter, GET /api/cover-letter/{id}, PUT /api/cover-letter/{id}, DELETE /api/cover-letter/{id}, GET /api/cover-letter/{id}/pdf. Frontend page at /dashboard/cover-letter-generator works correctly with two-panel layout (left: selection/history, right: editor). AI generation uses Emergent LLM key (NOT MOCKED). PDF generation uses reportlab.

backend_apis.POST /api/cover-letter/generate: PASS - Generates cover letter from resume_id and job_application_id
backend_apis.GET /api/cover-letter: PASS - Returns all saved cover letters

frontend_ui.Selection dropdowns: PASS - Resume and application selection work
frontend_ui.Generate button: PASS - Creates cover letter and shows in editor
